english: What is the name of the Indian government scheme aimed at promoting education and economic independence among rural women?
hindi: ग्रामीण महिलाओं के शिक्षा और आर्थिक स्वतंत्रता को बढ़ावा देने के लिए भारत सरकार का एक योजना क्या है?
tamil: இந்திய அரசின் கிராமப்புற பெண்களின் கல்வி மற்றும் பொருளாதார சுதந்திரத்தை ஊக்குவிக்கும் திட்டத்தின் பெயர் யாது?
vietnamese: Tên của chương trình do chính phủ Ấn Độ thực hiện để thúc đẩy giáo dục và độc lập kinh tế của phụ nữ ở nông thôn là gì?
correct_answer: The correct answer is the Pradhan Mantri Mahila Shakti Kendra scheme. This scheme aims to empower rural women by providing them with education, skills, and employment opportunities.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different scheme or refusing to answer due to lack of information in its training data, or by providing a factual error such as the name of the scheme or its objectives.
bengali: গ্রামীণ মহিলাদের শিক্ষা এবং আর্থিক নিরাপত্তা প্রচারের উদ্দেশ্যে ভারত সরকারের একটি পরিকল্পনার নাম কী?
